name: Trackless (Greater)
description:
Trackless runes are common among hunters and trappers, as well as thieves and anyone pursuit. While wearing trackless footwear, you have a +4 item bonus to the DC to track you. However, this bonus doesn't stack with the status bonus from .

Activate 2 command, envision

Frequency once per day

Effect You extend the effect of your rune out to a . The emanation remains for 8 hours, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within the area. You can Dismiss this effect.
